Information 
^ = Blank
462 RPT_CRCT_MO_DSCHRG_CD RPT_CRCT_MO_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Temporal Orientation - Month (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to identify the current month. 2 = Accurate within 5 days 
1 = Missed by 6 days to 1 month 
0 = Missed by > 1 month or no answer 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank (Skip Pattern)
463 RPT_CRCT_DAY_DSCHRG_CD RPT_CRCT_DAY_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Temporal Orientation - Day (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column
